mapper.select: /* LoginMapper.selectLoginFailCnt */ SELECT FAIL_CNT FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
/* LoginMapper.selectConfmYn */ SELECT CONFM_YN FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

/* LoginMapper.actionLogin */ SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId ,AUTH_GRP_CD AS authGrpCd ,MEMBER_NM AS memberNm ,MASTER_CODE AS masterCode ,MEMBER_EMAIL AS memberEmail ,MEMBER_BRTHDY AS memberBrthdy ,MEMBER_PHONE AS memberPhone ,MEMBER_POST AS memberPost ,MEMBER_ADDR AS memberAddr ,MEMBER_ADDR_DETL AS memberAddrDetl ,DATE_FORMAT(LAST_LOGIN_DT, '%Y%m%d') AS lastLoginDt ,FAIL_CNT AS failCnt FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_PW = #{memberPw} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* LoginMapper.updateLastLogin */ UPDATE TB_USER_INFO SET LAST_LOGIN_DT = now() WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{value}
mapper.select: /* LoginMapper.checkId */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

/* LoginMapper.selectSnsMember */ SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId ,AUTH_GRP_CD AS authGrpCd ,MEMBER_NM AS memberNm ,MASTER_CODE AS masterCode ,MEMBER_EMAIL AS memberEmail ,MEMBER_BRTHDY AS memberBrthdy ,MEMBER_PHONE AS memberPhone ,MEMBER_POST AS memberPost ,MEMBER_ADDR AS memberAddr ,MEMBER_ADDR_DETL AS memberAddrDetl ,DATE_FORMAT(LAST_LOGIN_DT, '%Y%m%d') AS lastLoginDt ,FAIL_CNT AS failCnt ,SNS_SE AS snsSe FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE SNS_ID = #{value}
/* LoginMapper.selectSnsIdCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE SNS_ID = #{value}
